_comment: GENERAL, domain-agnostic house-style colour tokens. Shared by ALL diagrams, lives in the skill (one source of truth). A diagram does NOT define colours; it MAPS its own domains onto the generic category slots below (cat1..cat6). Two consumers: SVG generators load this JSON (see presentation .py files) and use only these values — never a literal hex; D2-native diagrams import the generated palette.d2 (run build-style.py after editing this). 'neutral' covers everything non-categorical (text, edges, surfaces, borders) so no diagram file needs its own greys either.
